perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a striped yellow shirt holds a bottle of Salat dish soap and his phone, speaking excitedly to the camera. (2) He shows a Dcard post on his phone and begins preparing a foaming bottle with the dish soap. (3) Wearing a colorful headband, he applies thick white foam to his face and washes it in a plastic tub. (4) The scene shifts to a bathroom where he washes his hair with the dish soap and then has a woman scrub his back with it. (5) Finally, he stands with the woman, comparing the skin on his two arms, one washed with dish soap and one with body wash, before scratching his arm in discomfort.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music plays. A male voice is high-pitched, loud, and speaking very rapidly. (2) The sound of a pump being pressed and water splashing is heard as the man washes his face. (3) In the bathroom, the acoustics change to include natural reverb from the tiled environment along with the sound of running water. (4) A second, calmer female voice enters as she interacts with the man. (5) The music continues at a steady energy until the man's voice shifts to a tone of physical discomfort at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'He said the ingredients of Salat...' (Functional/Informative) (2) 'Same as body wash' (Decorative/Hook) (3) 'Starting from High School' (Decorative/Hook) (4) 'Became baby-like bouncy and pink' (Functional/Informative) (5) 'Dense bubbles' (Functional) (6) 'Thought it would be dry/astringent' (Decorative/Hook) (7) 'I'm like a plate' (Decorative/Hook) (8) 'I feel it's starting to get itchy' (Functional/Climax)

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Theory -> Multi-stage washing experiment (Face, Hair, Back) -> Result Comparison -> Twist/Warning

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator and 1 female assistant appearing midway.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male creator with short brown hair, wearing a yellow/orange striped shirt and later a colorful headband.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean indoor setting with white walls and a bathroom with beige tiles and a white bathtub.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Procedure -> Verification -> Comedic Twist
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A comedic 'scientific' test of an internet rumor claiming dish soap is equivalent to body wash. The creator documents himself using the soap on his face, hair, and body to entertain the audience, ultimately concluding that while it feels 'smooth' initially, it causes skin irritation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Mention of the creator's own brand 'hahobaby' in the text overlays.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed Mandarin narration, slapstick-style product testing, and bright variety-show style captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-energy 'influencer' style common in Taiwanese YouTube content, blending everyday items with absurd challenges to drive engagement.
